mechanics.excerpt: The Kurita doctors call post-traumatic stress syndrome_ The Clans call cowardice Declared unfit for duty, you sank into depression, wandering aimlessly from planet to planet until Clan-hat ing storekeeper wrongly accused you of shoplifting: Two years in Combine prison shook you out of your malaise, and kindly old cellmate taught you that not all Spheroids are hateful,6 Now; You seek redemption in whatever way You can find Though your Clan will not take you back; you believe that there must be worthy masters to serve somewhere_ even in tne misguided Inner Sphere Affiliation: Clan (p 31); Stage 1: Eaily Childhood (Trueborn Creche) Event Roll 351.
